mapper.select: SELECT * FROM investment_holding WHERE id = #{id} AND is_active = 1
SELECT * FROM investment_holding WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1
SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM investment_holding WHERE is_active = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO investment_holding (account_id, user_id, symbol, symbol_name, market, quantity, cost_price, cost_currency, price_currency, lot_size, note) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{userId}, #{symbol}, #{symbolName}, #{market}, #{quantity}, #{costPrice}, #{costCurrency}, #{priceCurrency}, #{lotSize}, #{note})
mapper.update: UPDATE investment_holding SET symbol_name = #{symbolName}, quantity = #{quantity}, cost_price = #{costPrice}, cost_currency = #{costCurrency}, price_currency = #{priceCurrency}, lot_size = #{lotSize}, note = #{note}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE investment_holding SET is_active = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
